mapper.select: SELECT point_total FROM member WHERE member_idx = #{member_idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (member_idx, total_price, status, order_date, delivery_address, address_detail) VALUES (#{member_idx}, #{total_price}, '결제완료', NOW(), #{member_address}, #{member_address_detail})
INSERT INTO orderitem (order_id, book_id, quantity, unit_price, book_quantity) VALUES (#{order_id}, #{book_id}, #{quantity}, #{unit_price}, 1)

INSERT INTO payment (order_id, member_idx, pay_amount, pay_method, used_points, saved_points, paid_at) VALUES (#{order_id}, #{member_idx}, #{pay_amount}, #{pay_method}, #{used_points}, #{saved_points}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT p.pay_amount, p.pay_method, p.used_points, o.order_id FROM payment p JOIN orders o ON p.order_id = o.order_id WHERE p.member_idx = #{member_idx} ORDER BY p.paid_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE member_idx = #{member_idx} ORDER BY order_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM payment WHERE member_idx = #{member_idx} ORDER BY paid_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT delivery_id, order_id, member_idx, receiver_name, receiver_phone, zipcode, delivery_address, address_detail, memo, status_code, shipper_name, delivery_date, tracking_number FROM delivery WHERE order_id = #{order_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO delivery ( order_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, zipcode, delivery_address, address_detail, memo, delivery_date, member_idx, status_code ) VALUES ( #{order_id}, #{receiver_name}, #{receiver_phone}, #{zipcode}, #{delivery_address}, #{address_detail}, #{memo}, NOW(), #{member_idx}, '배송준비중' )

INSERT INTO point ( member_idx, point_amount, change_amount, change_reason, change_date, point_status ) VALUES ( #{member_idx}, (SELECT point_total FROM member WHERE member_idx = #{member_idx}), -#{used_points}, '결제 시 포인트 사용', NOW(), '사용 완료' )

INSERT INTO point ( member_idx, point_amount, change_amount, change_reason, change_date, point_status ) VALUES ( #{member_idx}, (SELECT point_total FROM member WHERE member_idx = #{member_idx}), #{saved_points}, '결제 적립금', NOW(), '적립 완료' )
